arts.ttl: Question of the Day — How do you rate Raphaël Guerreiro’s performance at the No. 10 for Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany raised some eyebrows when he elected to deploy former Borussia Dortmund left-back and central midfielder Raphaël Guerreiro at the No. 10 position ahead of Thomas Müller, following an injury to Jamal Musiala. Clearly, Guerreiro has something to offer to this team and to the way Kompany prefers to play from the start, even with the present injury crisis at his more familiar left-back position.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich ready to go into debt to fight Manchester City for Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: Bild reports that Bayern Munich are ready to go into debt as they try to sign Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz in the summer. Bayern want to sign Wirtz this summer, and…

arts.ttl: Kane under scrutiny but Klinsmann defends Bayern striker
arts.sum: Harry Kane’s wait for a trophy could soon come to an end as Bayern Munich sit six points clear at the top of the Bundesliga table ahead of their game with Borussia Dortmund in Der Klassiker on Saturday. But it comes at a time when he is under scrutiny.

arts.ttl: Kompany gives injury update ahead of Der Klassiker
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany has provided an injury update on his Bayern Munich squad ahead of Saturday's clash with Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Kahn slams Bayern and Hoeneß over handling of Müller’s future
arts.sum: Oliver Kahn has voiced strong criticism of how Bayern Munich have handled Thomas Müller’s contract situation, taking a veiled swipe at supervisory board member Uli Hoeneß.
A number of Bundesliga clubs are said to be monitoring Bayern Munich youngster Felipe Chavez.

arts.ttl: Benjamin Hoeneß appointed Bayern Munich’s director of global partnerships
arts.sum: This time it is Benjamin, nephew of Uli — and brother to VfB Stuttgart coach Sebastian — who has assumed the mantle of “Director of Global Partnerships” with a focus on the club’s development in North America. Benjamin Hoeneß (Uli Hoeneß’ nephew and Sebastian Hoeneß’ brother) has been appointed Bayern’s ‘Director of Global Partnerships’.

arts.ttl: One last dance? Hummels linked with surprise Dortmund comeback
arts.sum: Bild is reporting that Borussia Dortmund are looking into the possibility of bringing Mats Hummels back on a short-term contract.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou insists Bayern Munich’s Mathys Tel ‘can hold his own in the Premier League.’
arts.sum: Prior to Eintracht Frankfurt’s 1-1 draw against Tottenham Hotspur in the Europa League on Thursday evening, Ange Postecoglou spoke on the future of the on loan Bayern Munich striker Mathys…

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: FC Cincinnati leading on Bayern Munich’s Thomas Müller?; Bayern, Manchester City, Liverpool battling for Inter Milan star?; Cristiano Ronaldo getting new deal?; Bayern, City, Real Madrid, PSG vying for Lazio star; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich, Liverpool FC, and Manchester City are reportedly among the teams keeping a close eye on Inter Milan midfielder Nico Barella: Bayern Munich legend Thomas Müller might be looking to extend his career and, if so, FC Cincinnati could be the frontrunner to land him:
